title: Painting Variant Textures
description: Makes it so that all the painting variants in the game have unique textures.
body:
**A resource pack that adds painting variant textures to the vanilla game!**

![Photo showing showing the textures in the creative inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64accbca1769f64bc55309be9e26595481e56fbe.png)

#
If you want to be able to craft the painting variants in survival mode, I have a data pack for that:  
[(Craftable Painting Variants) Datapack Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craftable-painting-variants)

![Photo showing showing the data pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78c9a75fce5a0617768ace141a970b9ec0d4d105.png)
